config.name: juniper_networks_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: juniper_networks_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Network Activity (4002)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:22:37.807208

-- Pre-compile regex patterns for better performance
local timestamp_pattern = "^(%d%d%d%d%-%d%d%-%d%d[T ]%d%d:%d%d:%d%d)"
local interface_pattern = "([a-zA-Z]+%-%d+/%d+/%d+)"
local ipv4_pattern = "(%d+%.%d+%.%d+%.%d+)"

-- Cached string operations
local format = string.format
local match = string.match
local gsub = string.gsub

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with local references
    local output = {
        class_uid = 4002,
        class_name = "Network Activity", 
        category_uid = 4,
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        metadata = {
            product = {
                name = "Juniper Networks Equipment",
                vendor_name = "Juniper Networks"
            },
            version = "1.0.0"
        },
        src_endpoint = {},
        dst_endpoint = {},
        network = {
            interface = {}
        }
    }

    -- Timestamp transformation with validation
    if record.timestamp then
        local ts = match(record.timestamp, timestamp_pattern)
        if ts then
            output.time = ts
        else
            output.time = os.time() * 1000 -- Fallback to current time
        end
    end

    -- Interface name transformation
    if record.interface then
        local interface = match(record.interface, interface_pattern)
        if interface then
            output.network.interface.name = interface
        end
    end

    -- IP address transformations with validation
    if record.src_ip and match(record.src_ip, ipv4_pattern) then
        output.src_endpoint.ip = record.src_ip
        if record.src_port then
            output.src_endpoint.port = tonumber(record.src_port)
        end
    end

    if record.dst_ip and match(record.dst_ip, ipv4_pattern) then
        output.dst_endpoint.ip = record.dst_ip
        if record.dst_port then
            output.dst_endpoint.port = tonumber(record.dst_port)
        end
    end

    -- Additional network activity fields
    if record.protocol then
        output.network.protocol = string.upper(record.protocol)
    end

    if record.action then
        output.activity_name = format("Network %s", record.action)
    end

    -- Status field mapping
    if record.status then
        output.status = record.status
        -- Map common status values
        if record.status:match("[Dd]own") then
            output.status_id = 2
        elseif record.status:match("[Uu]p") then
            output.status_id = 1
        end
    end

    -- Severity mapping
    if record.severity then
        local severity_map = {
            emergency = 1,
            alert = 2,
            critical = 3,
            error = 4,
            warning = 5,
            notice = 6,
            info = 7,
            debug = 8
        }
        output.severity_id = severity_map[record.severity:lower()] or 7
    end

    -- Validation of required OCSF fields
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handling wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end
